open item next to bodycal app
select icon at the top right corner
open the item to the right of the bodycal

"java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "pressed": "not_pressed", "text": "BodyCal is the ultimate body calculator that can help you set and achieve goals. BodyCal is designed to assist you when starting a diet, whether that be to lose or gain weight. There is no better app - That’s a fact.

 Why We’re Better Than Other Apps
 Largest amount of calculators that are specific to you. They range from IIFYM, Macro Calculator, BMI, Lean Body Mass, Body Fat Percentage, Tape Measure Body Fat, Caliper Body Fat, BMR, TDEE, Water Intake, Ideal Weight, Target Heart 
 Macro Plans and Diet Plans ranging from Ketogenic (Atkins), Paleo,Low Carb, Low Fat, Zone Diet, Body Building to Textbook
 1 Rep Max Calculator with various calculations
 Heart Rate Calculator with various calculations
 Easy to use and accurate!
 Many more tools!

BodyCal is designed to assist you when starting a diet, whether that be to lose or gain weight. There is no better app - That’s a fact.

 Why We’re Better Than Other Apps
 Largest amount of calculators that are specific to you. They range from IIFYM, Macro Calculator, BMI, Lean Body Mass, Body Fat Percentage, Tape Measure Body Fat, Caliper Body Fat, BMR, TDEE, Water Intake, Ideal Weight, Target Heart 
 Macro Plans and Diet Plans ranging from Ketogenic (Atkins), Paleo,Low Carb, Low Fat, Zone Diet, Body Building to Textbook
 1 Rep Max Calculator with various calculations
 Heart Rate Calculator with various calculations
 Easy to use and accurate!
 Many more tools!
